{{Quote|I met your father once when I was just a boy, Luke. He was a great pilot. You'll do all right out there. If you've got half your father's skill, you'll do a damn sight better than all right.|Garven Dreis to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] right before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]|<ref name="ANH Novelization">[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' novelization]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Virujansi''' occurred when the Republic launched a siege against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]]-held planet of [[Virujansi/Legends|Virujansi]].

==The battle==
The Separatists were using the planet as a staging-grounds for a significant number of battle droids. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] led the ground force, while [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] led the aerial units, which included the [[Virujansi Rarefied Air Cavalry/Legends|Rarefied Air Cavalry]], a military unit which [[Garven Dreis/Legends|Garven "Dave" Dreis]] served in. The result was a significant Republic victory. The natives called Skywalker the "[[Hero With No Fear/Legends|Hero With No Fear]]."

{{Battle-stub}}
